title: Alberta Invests $40M to Boost Advanced Low-Emission Technologies and Create Jobs in Manufacturing
content: Alberta is investing $40 million through the TIER program in the Advanced Materials Challenge, led by Emissions Reduction Alberta, to support the development of technologies that convert waste into low-emission, advanced materials. This initiative aims to create jobs, reduce emissions, and boost Alberta's manufacturing sector by funding projects that extract valuable metals, develop carbon-absorbing materials, and enhance product efficiency. Open to a range of applicants, the program offers up to $5 million per project, with applications closing on January 22, 2025.
author: Analysts Account
